source.title: BSEE Accident Investigation Report - Structural Damage, Crane/Other Lifting

event.top_event: Loss of Containment - Well Control Event
actions_taken: Drill crew shut down mud pumps and rotary
Closed upper annular on subsea BOP Stack
Closed diverter bag to divert flow overboard
General alarm sounded and personnel mustered at stations
Reported to National Response Center (NRC #1247605), BSEE, and USCG
ROV inspected marine riser and BOP stack
event.summary: On June 2, 2019 at 14:30 hours, the Seadrill West Capricorn Semi-Submersible Drilling Rig encountered a well control event while drilling the Taggert #3 Well in Mississippi Canyon Block 816. The drill crew observed increased return flow with increased gas at the surface (max gas=1386 units). After closing the BOP upper annular and diverter bag, approximately 4 barrels of Synthetic Oil-Based Mud (SBM) were diverted to the Gulf of Mexico waters. No injuries occurred. The probable cause was inadequate mud weight to balance pore pressure in the newly drilled hole section.
recommendations: BSEE New Orleans District made no recommendations to the Office of Incident Investigation

threats.name: BOP upper annular failure to seal

consequences.name: Loss of Containment - Synthetic Oil-Based Mud spill to Gulf of Mexico
Operational shutdown and lost production time

controls.name: Mud weight management and pore pressure balancing
controls.barrier_role: Prevent uncontrolled flow by maintaining adequate hydrostatic pressure
controls.lod_basis: Primary control to prevent well control by balancing formation pore pressure

supporting_text: Mud weight was inadequate to balance pore pressure in newly drilled hole section
At approximately 9,920' MD, the mud weight was increased to 9.9 PPG

controls.name: Subsea Blow-Out Preventer (BOP) Stack upper annular preventer
controls.barrier_role: Seal wellbore to prevent uncontrolled flow
controls.lod_basis: Critical safety system to contain well pressure and prevent loss of containment

supporting_text: The crew observed flow with the BOP upper annular closed
The team closed the upper annular on the subsea BOP Stack
ROV video inspection team found no problems with the riser or the BOP stack

controls.name: Diverter bag system
controls.barrier_role: Divert uncontrolled flow overboard to prevent deck spill and personnel exposure
controls.lod_basis: Secondary containment system to manage loss of containment event

supporting_text: The crew closed the diverter bag to divert flow overboard
The team closed the diverter bag and diverted approximately four barrels (bbl) of Synthetic Oil-Based Mud (SBM) from the marine riser into the Gulf of Mexico (GOM)

controls.name: Gas detection and monitoring (IADC reports, max gas units)
controls.barrier_role: Detect gas influx to alert crew of well control risk
controls.lod_basis: Early warning system to detect formation gas and trigger corrective action

supporting_text: the drill crew observed an increase in return flow with increased gas at the surface (max gas=1386 units)
Based on International Association of Drilling Contractors (IADC) reports, the drill crew experienced a max gas of 289 units during this time
The general alarm sounded and personnel mustered at stations

controls.name: Pit gain monitoring and mud sweep procedures
controls.barrier_role: Detect formation influx through pit volume changes and manage gas cut fluid
controls.lod_basis: Operational procedure to identify well control indicators

supporting_text: Gas cut fluid was accompanied by a small pit gain, which expanded as it was circulated up the hole
the drill crew proceeded to drill the 17.5" hole section (8,866' MD to 9,762' MD) with 9.8 PPG mud weight while pumping 50 bbl sweeps every other stand

controls.name: Emergency response and personnel muster procedures
controls.barrier_role: Protect personnel during well control event through organized evacuation and assembly
controls.lod_basis: Personnel safety and incident management during emergency

supporting_text: The general alarm sounded and personnel mustered at stations

notes.rules: JSON output only. mentioned fields must be evidence-based. Use null for unknown values.
